rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited throughout the paper.
Discusses the importance of text embeddings in NLP, highlighting challenges with vanishing gradients in cosine-based models. Describes AnglE's approach to mitigate these issues...
Reviews unsupervised and supervised approaches to text embeddings, emphasizing the limitations of existing models in addressing the cosine function's saturation zones.
Describes the datasets, evaluation metrics, implementation details, and results of AnglE in transfer and non-transfer STS tasks. Includes an ablation study and discussion on LLM...
